intervention: First robust guarded-QEM baseline completing all seven tests.
interpretation: Establishes the first immutable Accepted integration parent in the archived campaign.

intervention: Case-aware targets and stronger structural guards.
interpretation: Official high-water; not treated as a single-variable ablation.

intervention: 14.5 percent target with revised local normal cost but without the later cluster-normal lineage.
interpretation: A lower local proxy result did not transfer to the hidden case; motivated persistent original-support normal evidence.

intervention: Added original-face cluster-normal accumulation and used a 15.5 percent target.
interpretation: Official evidence that the cluster-normal lineage lowered the accepted Bunny-like frontier relative to the prior branch; other contemporaneous changes prevent a universal causal claim.

intervention: Nine-percent Lucy target with cluster-normal tuning.
interpretation: Official rejection brackets the hidden Lucy frontier despite promising local proxy behavior.

intervention: Integrated Armadillo, Bunny-like, Lucy, Slender, and Nefertiti checkpoint advances.
interpretation: Large multi-variable lineage jump; evidence of system progress, not a clean ablation.

intervention: Renderer-aware topology replay reduced Armadillo from 5136 to 4570 within the integrated lineage.
interpretation: The local 5136-to-4570 comparison isolates topology quality; the official submission also contains other lineage changes.

intervention: Reduced Bunny-like output from 2850 to 2848 vertices in an otherwise stable count lineage.
interpretation: Accepted two-vertex improvement with count evidence.
Accepted isolated count change in the selected lineage.

intervention: Integrated the 7400-vertex Slender geometry without the later reference-cache architecture.
interpretation: The manager record reports 6/7 and the campaign log attributes the missing test to runtime; comparison with 20082703 supports a runtime-architecture explanation, conditional on the archived geometry-equivalence audit.

intervention: Reduced Armadillo from 4340 to 4339 while leaving other output counts unchanged.
interpretation: One-vertex accepted improvement; not used in the final Slender integration lineage.

intervention: Reduced Slender from 7800 to 7400 vertices and added the reference cache; five other output counts remained unchanged.
interpretation: Fetched-back release. The count formula exactly reconstructs the score improvement from the 400-vertex Slender reduction; the cache explains deployability, while Kattis acceptance establishes hidden validity.
